about.name: Vikranth
bio: With a strong passion for AI and emerging technologies, I enjoy building intelligent systems that address real-world challenges. I'm driven by curiosity and continuous learning, exploring new technologies to design effective solutions and create impactful applications.
about.education: B.Tech ECE, MVGR College of Engineering

experience.title: AI/ML Projects Developer
description: Built Multi-Source RAG Assistant with advanced OCR, hybrid search, and persistent memory using LangGraph, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.
Developed Multi-Threaded WebRTC Voice Agent achieving sub-800ms latency with LiveKit, Deepgram, and ElevenLabs integration.
Created Conversational Text2SQL Assistant with dual-layer SQL security and intelligent query routing using LangGraph.
Engineered production-grade systems with Docker containerization, LangSmith monitoring, and comprehensive error handling.

experience.title: Student Researcher - AI/ML
description: Researching state-of-the-art approaches in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agentic AI systems.
Developing end-to-end solutions combining NLP, vector search, and LLM inference.
Exploring production deployment patterns and performance optimization techniques.

education.degree: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering

projects.title: Multi-Source RAG Assistant
description: Enterprise-grade document assistant that lets users chat with PDFs, websites, and scanned files in plain English.
Achieves highly accurate, hallucination-free answers using hybrid search and Cohere neural reranking.
Powered by stateful LangGraph workflows, PostgreSQL memory, and LlamaParse OCR.

projects.title: Multi-Threaded WebRTC Voice Agent
description: Ultra-low-latency AI voice companion featuring real-time, bidirectional WebRTC communication.
Orchestrates LiveKit, Deepgram STT, and LLaMA 3.3 to achieve incredible sub-800ms human-like response times.
Features autonomous browser control and a stunning 3D holographic Web Audio visualizer.

projects.title: Conversational Text2SQL Assistant
description: An intelligent interface that instantly translates natural language questions into complex SQL queries.
Features self-healing query execution and AST security layers to completely block destructive database commands.
Optimized for extreme speed with Redis caching, connection pooling, and live LangSmith telemetry.

resume.summary: B.Tech ECE student with expertise in Generative AI and agentic systems. Specialized in RAG applications, production-grade system design, and end-to-end problem solving. Passionate about building AI solutions that work at scale.

skills.languages: Python, JavaScript, SQL, HTML, CSS, C
skills.databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Qdrant, FAISS, Chroma
skills.aiml: LLMs, Embeddings, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Speech-to-Text, Text-to-Speech
